scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && cross-env PORT=5001 npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && cross-env VITE_API_PORT=5001 npm run dev
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
